_comments.attitude: Reduced derivative gain to avoid noise amplification
_comments.ndi_rate: Reduced proportional gain, added small derivative for stability
_comments.feedback_rate: Re-enabled with conservative gains for robustness
_comments.limits: Safety limits for accelerations and tilt angles
_comments.changes: Reduced NDI Kp from 1.0 to 0.15, reduced att Kd from 8.0 to 2.0, enabled feedback rate
